message: Hostile pass: reviewing the new add/edit/remove mechanism for failure modes
context:
=== BREAK MY NEWEST MECHANISM ===
Newest mechanism: Add MCP server form flow (startAdd → submitAdd → addMutation → SDK call)

Attacks executed:
✓ Double-click submit: guarded by addMutation.isPending check
✓ Empty name/url validation: trimmed, empty check with user-visible error
✓ Keyboard: Enter submits, Escape goes back, event.isComposing guards against IME
✓ Error recovery: onError sets form error state, user can retry
✓ DropdownMenu remove: disconnectMutation only disconnects when currently connected
✓ Toggle switch: guarded by toggle.isPending && toggle.variables check

Surviving weakness: The McpRemoteConfig type only supports url, not headers/oauth config. More complex MCP setups require direct config file editing. This is a deferred seam.
